CVE-2007-1103.title: Tor does not verify a node's uptime and bandwidth advertisements, ...
CVE-2007-1103.description: Tor does not verify a node's uptime and bandwidth advertisements, which allows remote attackers who operate a low resource node to make false claims of greater resources, which places the node into use for many circuits and compromises the anonymity of traffic sources and destinations.

CVE-2009-0654.title: Tor 0.2.0.28, and probably 0.2.0.34 and earlier, allows remote at ...
CVE-2009-0654.description: Tor 0.2.0.28, and probably 0.2.0.34 and earlier, allows remote attackers, with control of an entry router and an exit router, to confirm that a sender and receiver are communicating via vectors involving (1) replaying, (2) modifying, (3) inserting, or (4) deleting a single cell, and then observing cell recognition errors at the exit router.  NOTE: the vendor disputes the significance of this issue, noting that the product's design "accepted end-to-end correlation as an attack that is too expensive to solve."

CVE-2020-8516.title: The daemon in Tor through 0.4.1.8 and 0.4.2.x through 0.4.2.6 doe ...
CVE-2020-8516.description: The daemon in Tor through 0.4.1.8 and 0.4.2.x through 0.4.2.6 does not verify that a rendezvous node is known before attempting to connect to it, which might make it easier for remote attackers to discover circuit information. NOTE: The network team of Tor claims this is an intended behavior and not a vulnerability

CVE-2025-4444.title: A security flaw has been discovered in Tor up to 0.4.7.16/0.4.8.1 ...
CVE-2025-4444.description: A security flaw has been discovered in Tor up to 0.4.7.16/0.4.8.17. Impacted is an unknown function of the component Onion Service Descriptor Handler. Performing manipulation results in resource consumption. The attack may be initiated remotely. The attack's complexity is rated as high. The exploitability is considered difficult. Upgrading to version 0.4.8.18 and 0.4.9.3-alpha is recommended to address this issue. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

CVE-2026-44597.title: Tor before 0.4.9.7 has an out-of-bounds read when an END, a TRUNC ...
CVE-2026-44597.description: Tor before 0.4.9.7 has an out-of-bounds read when an END, a TRUNCATE, or a TRUNCATED cell lacks a reason in its payload, aka TROVE-2026-011.

CVE-2026-44599.title: Tor before 0.4.9.7 can attempt or accept BEGIN_DIR via conflux le ...
CVE-2026-44599.description: Tor before 0.4.9.7 can attempt or accept BEGIN_DIR via conflux legs, aka TROVE-2026-008.

CVE-2026-44600.title: Tor before 0.4.9.7 mishandles accounting of the conflux out-of-or ...
CVE-2026-44600.description: Tor before 0.4.9.7 mishandles accounting of the conflux out-of-order queue during the clearing of a queue, aka TROVE-2026-010.

CVE-2026-44601.title: Tor before 0.4.9.7, when circuit queue memory pressure exists, ca ...
CVE-2026-44601.description: Tor before 0.4.9.7, when circuit queue memory pressure exists, can experience a client crash because of a double close of a circuit, aka TROVE-2026-009.

CVE-2026-44602.title: Tor before 0.4.9.7 has a NULL pointer dereference when a CERT cel ...
CVE-2026-44602.description: Tor before 0.4.9.7 has a NULL pointer dereference when a CERT cell is received out of order, aka TROVE-2026-006.

CVE-2026-44603.title: Tor before 0.4.9.7 has an out-of-bounds read by one byte via a ma ...
CVE-2026-44603.description: Tor before 0.4.9.7 has an out-of-bounds read by one byte via a malformed BEGIN cell, aka TROVE-2026-007.
